title: Accessible Tabbed Navigation

statement.markdown:
## Aria Tabbed Navigation Component

Build an accessible Tab component resolving tab selection states.

### Requirements:
1. **Aria Guidelines**: Apply role structural tags: `role="tablist"`, `role="tab"`, `aria-selected` properties.
2. **Arrow Key Switching**: Horizontal navigation switching tabs focus selections with `ArrowRight` and `ArrowLeft` keys.
3. **Content panels toggling**: Ensure clicking a tab updates active state selectors, displaying only matched panels.

constraints: Must correctly sync selected states with visible panel containers
Active tab item should receive explicit focused states

starterCode.html:
Main Tab Panel details contents.

History details contents.

gradingCriteria.description: Verify tabpanel toggles and aria-selected state properties match active selections.
Verify horizontal Left/Right arrows switch tab focus indices smoothly.
